entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., the crop species being studied for hybrid systems

entities.name: RESTORATION OF FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability to restore fertility in cytoplasmic male sterile lines, denoted as Rf

entities.name: A4 HYBRID SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific hybrid system in pigeonpea based on A4 cytoplasmic male sterility

entities.name: PCR-BASED MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers developed for low-cost genotyping to identify fertility restorer lines

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of the F2 population

entities.name: A4 CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A system of male sterility used for commercial hybrid production in pigeonpea

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with the restoration of fertility trait

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: The second filial generation developed by crossing CMS and restorer lines for mapping

entities.name: ICPA 2039
entities.description: A CMS line used as a parent to develop the F2 mapping population

entities.name: ICPL 87119
entities.description: A fertility restorer line used as a parent to develop the F2 mapping population

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing approach used to generate SNP data for the F2 population

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic variations at a single position in DNA used for genetic mapping

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A map developed with 306 SNPs covering 981.9 cM to locate QTLs

entities.name: S8_7664779
entities.description: A specific SNP marker that flanks the major QTL on CcLG08

entities.name: S8_6474381
entities.description: A specific SNP marker that flanks the major QTL on CcLG08

entities.name: CCLG08
entities.description: The linkage group/chromosome where the major QTL for restoration of fertility is located

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: Lines used to maintain the CMS line, used for sequence comparison

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Lines that restore fertility to CMS lines, the target for identification using markers

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of creating hybrid varieties to improve crop traits

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The traditional, time-consuming process of observing physical traits to identify restorer lines
